topic: Bulletproof Automated Multimedia Creative System Architecture — Proto-ORGANVM Seven-Organ Blueprint
content_preview: Complete architectural specification for a GitHub-native seven-organ creative system (Theory, Art, Commerce, Public Process, Community, Marketing, Archive) with central registry, double-hyphen naming convention, YAML frontmatter standards, cross-repo dispatch automation, POSSE distribution, Zenodo DOI integration, and immutable reference architecture. Draws on Bauhaus pedagogy, SKOS polyhierarchy, musical counterpoint, and Deleuze/Guattari rhizome. Includes registry schema, GitHub Actions workflows, temporal cadence management, and 4-week implementation sequence. The direct architectural ancestor of ORGANVM's eight-organ model.
